mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, task_id, title, done, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM subtasks WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subtasks (tenant_id, task_id, title, done, created_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{s.taskId}, #{s.title}, #{s.done}, #{s.createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM subtasks WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
DELETE FROM subtasks WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
